Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 14}While exploring Tartarus, you may encounter elusive {f 0 1 2}rare Shadows{f 0 1 27}. Defeating them will net you {f 0 1 2}hefty rewards{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 14}Rare Shadows will attempt to flee if they spot you. They'll keep running until {f 0 1 2}they successfully escape{f 0 1 27}. You'll want to ambush them from behind and strike quickly.[n]{f 1 1}
